decisions.title: Explore V2 GA Launch Date: March 31, 2026
decisions.context: Analytics instrumentation and event renaming (ENG-9276, ENG-9275) must be completed before GA. This is critical for measuring North Star metric (Decisions Captured Per Customer) and validates 'Nail the Core' pillar.
decisions.blockedBy: Analytics event cleanup must complete by March 24 to allow validation time

arguments.for: Market timing is optimal, sales pipeline ready, competitive pressure mounting. Delaying reduces Q2 revenue opportunity by ~$400K.
arguments.against: Analytics foundation incomplete = blind to user behavior post-launch. Cannot validate decision capture metrics. Risk shipping without measurement = cannot prove value or iterate effectively.

decisions.title: Prioritize K2 Mission Data Pipeline over Channel List v2 polish
decisions.context: ENG-9104 (K2 Mission pipeline) enables new customer segment (aerospace/defense). Channel list v2 (ENG-9077, ENG-9271) improves existing UX. Trade-off between 'Embed Deeper' (new use case) vs 'Nail the Core' (better experience).
decisions.blockedBy: Engineering capacity allocation unclear for next sprint

arguments.for: K2 Mission = $1.2M ARR opportunity, expands TAM into defense sector (Build the Moat). Strategic differentiation. Channel list v2 is incremental improvement.
arguments.against: Existing customers report channel search frustration (ENG-9271 abort searches, ENG-8355 text wrapping). Churn risk if core workflows remain clunky. Should nail existing experience before expanding.

decisions.title: Build Python Rules native integration vs. API-only approach
decisions.context: No direct signal in current tickets, but FD-43 (data import) and ENG-8234/ENG-8228 (fresh data reads) suggest push toward programmatic access. Python Rules product needs decision on integration depth.
decisions.blockedBy: Requires Canvas roadmap alignment and architecture review for embed strategy

arguments.for: Native integration = 'Embed Deeper' pillar realized. Enables automated decision capture (North Star). Competitive moat vs. Tableau/PowerBI. Increases stickiness 3x based on beta data.
arguments.against: Significant engineering lift (8-10 weeks). Delays Explore V2 post-GA improvements. API-first approach faster to market, validates demand before heavy investment. Risk building wrong abstraction.

decisions.title: Accelerate Sift Edge readiness vs. polish Explore V2 post-GA
decisions.context: ENG-9254 (K8s job readiness), ENG-9179 (readiness checklist), ENG-9174/9175 (network docs) indicate Edge deployment prep. ENG-7899 (catalog service errors in gov) shows deployment complexity.
decisions.blockedBy: Knox approval timeline unknown, security review could take 4-8 weeks

arguments.for: Sift Edge = 'Build the Moat' crown jewel. On-prem/air-gapped = untapped $5M+ ARR market. First-mover advantage in secure analytics. Differentiates from cloud-only competitors.
arguments.against: Explore V2 just launched, needs iteration based on user feedback. Splitting focus risks both products being mediocre. Edge deployment complexity high (gov env errors). Should stabilize core before expanding.

decisions.title: Invest in Ask SIFT conversational analytics now or wait for Canvas maturity
decisions.context: No direct signals, but ENG-9126/DES-135 (Global Nav prototypes) suggest UX rethink. Ask SIFT could be nav entry point. Canvas maturity affects whether Ask SIFT surfaces decision templates or raw queries.
decisions.blockedBy: Canvas product definition incomplete, GenAI roadmap unclear

arguments.for: Ask SIFT = ultimate 'Signal>Evidence>Decision' interface. Natural language query = accessibility = broader user adoption = more decisions captured. Market expects AI features, competitive pressure (Sigma/Mode investing heavily).
arguments.against: Canvas templates must exist for Ask SIFT to be valuable (otherwise just chatbot to SQL). Premature to build NL interface before decision frameworks are codified. Risk: shiny AI feature that doesn't drive North Star metric.

keyResults.name: Explore V2 GA with <10% regression in core workflows
K2 Mission pipeline deployed to prod

timeAudit.weekSummary: 67% of week in meetings. Only 8 deep work hours for 30 active engineering tickets = bottleneck risk.
alerts: 3 one-on-ones today limit decision-making bandwidth for critical GA launch call
No focus blocks Wed-Thu despite March 31 deadline pressure on analytics instrumentation
22 meetings this week = context switching kills flow on complex technical decisions (K2 pipeline, Edge readiness)
Engineering leads report 'meeting fatigue' impacting velocity on ENG-9254, ENG-9276 critical path items

events.title: Analytics Event Renaming Complete
events.description: ENG-9276 must complete to allow 1 week buffer before GA. Critical path for measuring North Star metric post-launch.

events.title: K2 Mission Pipeline Decision
events.description: Product leadership aligns on prioritization: K2 Mission vs Channel List v2 polish. Impacts sprint planning Mar 24.

events.title: Fresh Data Reads E2E Testing
events.description: ENG-8819 validates fresh+historical merge. Unblocks downsampling config (ENG-8791, ENG-8790) for GA.

events.title: Global Nav Prototype Review
events.description: ENG-9126/DES-135 review. Determines if Ask SIFT can be nav-level feature or needs separate entry. Informs Q2 roadmap.

events.title: Amplitude Instrumentation Complete
events.description: ENG-9275 final implementation. Last validation checkpoint before GA launch. No slip allowed.

events.title: Python Rules Integration Decision
events.description: Native vs API-only approach decided. Impacts Q2 engineering allocation and Canvas roadmap dependencies.

events.title: Sift Edge Architecture Review
events.description: ENG-9174/9175 network diagram walkthrough. Knox submission readiness check. Security team signoff required.

events.title: Catalog Service Gov Environment Fix
events.description: ENG-7899 resolution validates Edge deployment viability. Critical for convincing leadership Edge is ready.

events.title: Sift Edge Acceleration Decision
events.description: VP Eng + Head of Product align on Edge timeline vs Explore V2 post-GA polish trade-off. Impacts H1 revenue forecasts.

events.title: Explore V2 GA Launch
events.description: Public launch of Explore V2. Analytics instrumentation live. Begin measuring Decisions Captured Per Customer at scale.

events.title: Post-GA Launch Retrospective
events.description: Team debrief on launch execution. Identify quick wins for week 1 iteration. Prioritize bug fixes vs new features.

events.title: K2 Mission Pipeline Demo
events.description: ENG-9104 complete. Internal demo to sales team. Enables outbound to aerospace/defense prospects for Q2 pipeline.

events.title: Ask SIFT vs Canvas Maturity Decision
events.description: Product leadership decides timing for Ask SIFT investment. Depends on Canvas template library status and GenAI roadmap clarity.

events.title: K2 Mission Pipeline Production Deploy
events.description: ENG-9104 live in prod. First aerospace customer onboarding begins. Validates 'Embed Deeper' pillar expansion.

events.title: Knox Approval Target
events.description: Sift Edge security review complete. Unblocks gov/on-prem sales motion for H2. $5M+ ARR opportunity.
